title: The Sensor Lab
narrative: The factory is humming again! Now the robot enters the sensor lab for upgrades. It can detect walls, gears, and lamps — and make decisions based on what it senses. Time to teach your robot to think for itself.

levels.name: Wall Ahead?
levels.hint: A wall blocks the straight path. Use 'If Wall' to make the robot turn only when it detects a wall ahead!

levels.name: Gem Detector
levels.hint: Move through the row. Use 'If Gem' to pick up gears only where they exist — don't waste moves!

levels.name: Smart Patrol
levels.hint: A corridor with mixed gears and lamps. Combine If Gem + If Lamp inside a Repeat to handle everything automatically!
